subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Upon thee be My Glory! When thou hast attained unto My Tablet and gained the Kawthar of Mine utterance, say: My God, my God! All praise be unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد علیک بهآئی اذا فزت بلوحی و فزت بکوثر بیانی قل الهی الهی لک الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
